text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running through today's practice schedule, I
decide to call it a day when King Halo protests.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This amount of practice is simply insufficient!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I can't just do what everyone else does if I want to
prove that I'm a first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I must tackle even routine training with more
effort and passion than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why we're adding on extra training! You
must make certain I'm in top form!
choice_data_list:
First-rate runners also have to know when to
call it a day.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why you're my trainer. Now I'm
bursting with energy and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I give King Halo all the training she can handle.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urk... "When to call it a day," huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's true... Pushing yourself so hard you get sick is
certainly not first-rate...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying that the most important thing to
do is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
To stay in top condition so I can always give one
hundred percent?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In that case, I suppose I can accept this.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll rest up and not overdo it... All for the sake of
continuing my first-rate reign!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we talk it out, King Halo decides to refrain
from extra training.
